description: Repair the project from build-only confidence to real regression confidence by enforcing true test gates and fixing the three currently failing critical paths: Flag effect failure, integration resource break, and tutorial/simulation quality regressions.

userStories.title: Real Test Gate as Default
userStories.description: As a developer, I want npm test to run real regression suites so that validation reflects actual gameplay correctness instead of superficial checks.
acceptanceCriteria: npm test executes AllTests, IntegrationTests, and testGameSimulation
validate depends on the real test gate

userStories.title: Fix Flag Effect Core Failure
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Flag set effect logic to behave correctly so that core state transitions are reliable.
acceptanceCriteria: AllTests no longer reports the Flag set effect assertion failure
Flag state is correctly persisted for the tested scenario

userStories.title: Restore Integration Resource Consistency
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests to resolve all referenced data assets so that integration validation can run end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: IntegrationTests runs without ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND on demonic.json
Referenced line-data assets are consistent with current data layout
npm test progresses through integration stage

userStories.title: Recover Tutorial Trigger Path
userStories.description: As a designer/developer, I want tutorial events to trigger in simulation so that onboarding progression is not silently broken.
acceptanceCriteria: testGameSimulation no longer reports tutorial events not triggered
Tutorial trigger age/condition path is verifiable in simulation output

userStories.title: Stabilize Early Growth Curve Signals
userStories.description: As a designer/developer, I want core growth signals (learning/combat) to stay within expected baseline so that simulation no longer flags persistent low-growth anomalies.
acceptanceCriteria: testGameSimulation no longer emits persistent core warnings for low knowledge/combat growth
Weight/trigger adjustments are limited to in-scope event sets

userStories.title: Document and Enforce Release Validation
userStories.description: As a team, I want a documented pre-merge validation contract so that all contributors follow the same quality gate.
acceptanceCriteria: Documentation clearly defines required checks: typecheck + build + real tests
Validation workflow is reproducible for local and CI usage
No unresolved critical test failures remain
